# 40 Integration Contract Assumptions

        - Task: `seq_040`
        - Visual mode: `Contract_Cockpit`
        - Captured on: `2026-04-11`
        - Mission: Freeze the authoritative external-integration assumption ledger and degraded-mode default pack so Vecells can execute mock-now simulator work and later live-provider work without silent truth drift.

        ## Summary

        - Dependency rows: `20`
        - Ambiguous defaults named: `20`
        - Degraded defaults named: `20`
        - Unresolved conflict rows: `16`

        ## Mock_now_execution

        The now-executable ledger closes the "integration behavior is obvious" gap. Each dependency row below names the proof contract, the ambiguity class, the degraded default, and the manual fallback that current simulators and current product surfaces must obey.

        | Dependency | Family | Proof Objects | Ambiguity | Degraded Default | Manual Fallback | Blocker |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dep_nhs_login_rail`<br>NHS login authentication rail | Identity & access | SessionEstablishmentDecision<br>IdentityBinding<br>RouteIntentBinding<br>SessionContinuityFence | Auth Authority Pending | Freeze the route in claim-pending or auth-read-only posture until writable authority is re-proven for the same subject and route intent. | Route to support-assisted recovery or a secure-link continuation path without widening identity truth. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_pds_fhir_enrichment`<br>Optional PDS enrichment seam | Identity & access | IdentityBindingAuthority<br>PdsEnrichmentDecision<br>MatchConfidenceSnapshot<br>FeatureFlagDecision<br>WrongPatientRepairHold | Governed Enrichment Withheld | Keep enrichment fully off and rely on local matching only; do not widen patient identity confidence from incomplete or legally unapproved PDS signals. | Support-assisted correction or governed local review without changing the baseline identity contract. | Watch only |
| `dep_telephony_ivr_recording_provider`<br>Telephony, IVR, and call-recording provider | Communications | CallSession<br>CallbackOutcomeEvidenceBundle<br>AdapterReceiptCheckpoint<br>CallSessionRecord<br>RecordingAvailabilityObservation<br>EvidenceReadinessAssessment<br>SMSContinuationGrant | Contact Evidence Incomplete | Hold the request in callback, audio-review, or urgent-live-only posture when recording availability is weaker than evidence readiness. | Escalate to governed manual callback or urgent live diversion with explicit operator ownership. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_transcription_processing_provider`<br>Transcript and derived-facts processing provider | Evidence processing | TelephonyTranscriptReadinessRecord<br>TelephonyEvidenceReadinessAssessment<br>TranscriptReadinessDecision<br>DerivedFactsPackage<br>ManualReviewRequirement<br>SupersessionLedgerEntry | Readiness Not Safety Usable | Keep transcript output in degraded, manual-review, or continuation-challenge posture until readiness is explicitly safety-usable. | Route to manual transcription or audio review and keep superseded transcript runs visible for comparison. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_sms_notification_provider`<br>SMS delivery provider | Communications | AdapterReceiptCheckpoint<br>AccessGrant<br>CommunicationEnvelope<br>ReplayReviewDecision<br>ControlledResendAuthorisation<br>DeliveryRepairWindow<br>AuditReplayEnvelope<br>SMSContinuationGrant<br>DeliveryEvidence<br>LinkRedemptionFence<br>WrongRecipientRepairDecision | Delivery Or Recipient Disputed | Withdraw seeded continuation trust and fall back to challenge-based continuation or another governed contact route when recipient or delivery truth is disputed. | Support reissue or bounded callback under the same grant lineage rather than silent re-send. | Watch only |
| `dep_email_notification_provider`<br>Email and notification delivery provider | Communications | MessageDeliveryEvidenceBundle<br>AdapterReceiptCheckpoint<br>CommunicationEnvelope<br>ReplayReviewDecision<br>ControlledResendAuthorisation<br>DeliveryRepairWindow<br>AuditReplayEnvelope<br>DeliveryAttempt<br>DeliveryEvidence<br>TemplateVersionBinding<br>RepairDecision | Delivery Or Thread Unresolved | Preserve a read-only, pending-delivery, or repair-needed posture until current delivery evidence or a governed fallback settles the route. | Use controlled resend, callback escalation, or support repair under the same authoritative communication chain. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_malware_scanning_provider`<br>Malware and artifact scanning provider | Evidence processing | ScanVerdict<br>QuarantineDecision<br>ReleaseFromQuarantineDecision<br>ReacquireEvidenceRequest | Quarantine Or Scan Conflict | Fail closed into quarantined, unreadable, or reacquire-required posture until the current artifact verdict is explicit. | Manual review, re-upload, or release-from-quarantine under named operator approval only. | Operational blocker |
| `dep_im1_pairing_programme`<br>IM1 Pairing programme and prerequisite path | GP booking | ProviderCapabilitySnapshot<br>SlotSearchTruth<br>BookingCommitAttempt<br>BookingConfirmationTruthProjection | Programme Gate Not Cleared | Keep the path simulator-only, supported-test-only, or assisted-only until the exact supplier and environment clear the IM1 stage pack. | Hub fallback or human-assisted booking handling where policy allows, with no false live-availability claim. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_gp_system_supplier_paths`<br>Principal GP-system supplier integration paths | GP booking | ProviderCapabilitySnapshot<br>SlotSearchTruth<br>BookingCommitAttempt<br>BookingConfirmationTruthProjection | Supplier Capability Not Bound | Keep supplier paths in simulator, assisted-only, or reconciliation-required posture until the current supplier binding and supported action tuple are published. | Fallback to hub handling, waitlist, callback, or manual practice liaison depending on the current policy tuple. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_local_booking_supplier_adapters`<br>Local booking supplier adapter family | GP booking | BookingConfirmationTruthProjection<br>BookingTransaction<br>ProviderCapabilitySnapshot<br>ExternalConfirmationGate<br>RequestLifecycleLease | Confirmation Pending Or Disputed | Hold the booking in confirmation-pending, supplier-reconciliation-pending, waitlist, or callback fallback posture until durable confirmation proof exists. | Use waitlist, callback, or manual reconciliation without projecting a booked state. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_network_capacity_partner_feeds`<br>Network and hub partner capacity feeds | GP booking | CandidateSnapshot<br>NetworkCoordinationPolicyEvaluation<br>CapacitySnapshot<br>ReservationWindowEvidence<br>NoSlotFallbackDecision<br>CallbackOfferEligibility | Freshness Or Trust Admission Unclear | Treat the feed as diagnostic-only, callback-only, or quarantined when freshness or trust admission no longer holds. | Callback fallback or operational escalation with explicit provenance instead of stale direct offers. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_cross_org_secure_messaging_mesh`<br>Cross-organisation secure messaging rail including MESH | Messaging transport | MESHMessageEnvelope<br>TransportReceipt<br>ReplayFence<br>DeliveryObservation | Transport Delivery Unproven | Keep the route in pending-delivery, monitored-mailbox, or escalation posture when transport receipt is weaker than current delivery evidence. | Use monitored mailbox review or telephone escalation where policy allows, under the same idempotent effect chain. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_origin_practice_ack_rail`<br>Origin-practice acknowledgement rail | Messaging transport | PracticeAcknowledgementRecord<br>ProviderCapabilitySnapshot<br>ExternalConfirmationGate<br>BookingConfirmationTruthProjection<br>RequestLifecycleLease | Ack Generation Unsettled | Keep practice visibility in overdue-ack, recovery-required, or exception-pending posture until the current truth tuple is acknowledged or explicitly excepted. | Operational escalation and duty-task follow-up on the same truth tuple rather than silent debt clearance. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_pharmacy_directory_dohs`<br>Pharmacy directory and discovery dependency | Pharmacy | PharmacyDirectorySnapshot<br>PharmacyChoiceProof<br>PharmacyProviderCapabilitySnapshot<br>ChoiceTupleFreshness | Directory Snapshot Or Choice Drift | Regenerate the directory, warn about drift, or constrain to clinician-guided choice when the current snapshot is stale or materially changed. | Clinician-guided provider choice or renewed consent before dispatch if no safe current directory tuple remains. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_pharmacy_referral_transport`<br>Pharmacy referral transport dependency | Pharmacy | DispatchProofEnvelope<br>TransportAssuranceProfile<br>ExternalConfirmationGate<br>PharmacyDispatchEnvelope<br>PharmacyDispatchAcknowledgement<br>PharmacyDispatchExpiry | Dispatch Proof Pending Or Contradicted | Hold the referral in proof-pending, contradiction-review, or controlled-redispatch posture until current dispatch proof and acknowledgement thresholds are satisfied. | Manual-assisted dispatch with attestation and second-person review where the route policy requires it. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_pharmacy_outcome_observation`<br>Pharmacy outcome observation and reconciliation path | Pharmacy | PharmacyOutcomeRecord<br>PharmacyBounceBackRecord<br>PharmacyCase<br>PharmacyOutcomeReconciliationGate<br>PharmacyOutcomeMatchAssessment<br>UpdateRecordVisibilityObservation | Outcome Match Or Replay Unresolved | Keep the case in outcome-reconciliation-pending or safety-review posture until the outcome matches the active case and replay concerns are cleared. | Manual structured capture or clarification with no auto-close on weak, duplicate, or delayed outcome evidence. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_pharmacy_urgent_return_professional_routes`<br>Pharmacy urgent-return and professional-contact routes | Pharmacy | PharmacyCase | Urgent Return Unacknowledged | Treat the route as unavailable or unsafe until urgent-return ownership and current acknowledgement are explicit. | Immediate supervisor or duty escalation by phone when the monitored digital route is unavailable or unacknowledged. | Hard blocker |
| `dep_nhs_app_embedded_channel_ecosystem`<br>NHS App embedded-channel ecosystem | Embedded channels | NHSAppIntegrationManifest<br>PatientEmbeddedNavEligibility<br>PatientEmbeddedSessionProjection<br>SiteLinkPublicationTuple<br>EmbeddedBridgeCapabilitySnapshot<br>AppReturnIntent<br>ReleaseGateEvidence | Embedded Manifest Or Bridge Drift | Drop to safe browser handoff, read-only embed, or placeholder-only posture when manifest, bridge, or embedded continuity evidence drifts. | Use governed release review and manual site-link confirmation before widening embedded routes. | Watch only |
| `dep_assistive_model_vendor_family`<br>Assistive model vendor and subprocessor family | Assurance watch | AssistiveCapabilityTrustEnvelope<br>AssistiveCapabilityRolloutVerdict | Trust Envelope Shadow Only | Force assistive capability back to shadow-only, observe-only, provenance-only, or hidden posture whenever the trust envelope is degraded, stale, or quarantined. | Continue the core workflow with no model dependency and preserve provenance-only evidence for later review. | Watch only |
| `dep_nhs_assurance_and_standards_sources`<br>NHS standards and assurance source set | Assurance watch | StandardsVersionMap<br>StandardsDependencyWatchlist | Standards Baseline Stale Or Moved | Freeze the affected onboarding, release, or provider assumption pack until the current standards baseline is rechecked and mapped. | Open an explicit standards exception or evidence-gap register entry rather than silently proceeding. | Operational blocker |

        ## Actual_provider_strategy_later

        The same dependency rows govern live-provider movement later. Provider onboarding may widen only when the evidence, non-negotiables, and live gates below are satisfied or explicitly overridden through the conflict register.

        | Dependency | Live Evidence Needed | Non-Negotiables | Provider Flex Behind Adapter | Live Gate / Approval |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dep_nhs_login_rail` | Partner approval and current redirect inventory<br>Technical conformance evidence<br>Environment-specific callback and session-parity rehearsal<br>Fresh gate snapshot stamped with the capture date<br>Official label checks still match the current NHS login guidance<br>Named redirect review reference linked to the active route family<br>Scope approval reference tied to the same environment target | Callback success alone never equals writable authority<br>Claim-pending and auth-read-only remain separate post-auth states<br>Route-intent binding remains mandatory for write access | Client identifiers and signing material<br>Environment-scoped redirect URIs<br>Official branding or consent-page chrome outside Vecells control | Required env: nhs login named approver, nhs login environment target, allow real provider mutation<br>Blocked gates: LIVE_GATE_EXTERNAL_FOUNDATION_WITHHELD, LIVE_GATE_NHS_LOGIN_PARTNER_APPROVED, LIVE_GATE_ENVIRONMENT_TARGET_MISSING, LIVE_GATE_MUTATION_FLAG_DISABLED, LIVE_GATE_IM1_SCAL_APPROVED<br>Review gates: LIVE_GATE_REDIRECT_URI_REVIEW, LIVE_GATE_TECHNICAL_CONFORMANCE_PENDING |
| `dep_pds_fhir_enrichment` | Legal basis and selected access mode<br>Named approver and environment<br>Wrong-patient and rollback readiness evidence<br>Draft receipt linked to the chosen access mode<br>Current hazard and risk log references attached to the same draft<br>Named legal or governance approval reference<br>Rollback rehearsal evidence tied to the same route-bound access mode | PDS stays optional and feature-flagged<br>Local binding and NHS login remain the baseline identity authority<br>Wrong-patient repair holds remain explicit even when enrichment is enabled | Access mode and network path<br>Certificate or credential profile<br>Demographic field mapping breadth | Required env: pds named approver, pds environment target, pds organisation ods, pds use case owner, allow real provider mutation<br>Blocked gates: GATE_EXTERNAL_TO_FOUNDATION, LIVE_GATE_PDS_LEGAL_BASIS_APPROVED, PDS_LIVE_GATE_NAMED_APPROVER_PRESENT, PDS_LIVE_GATE_ENVIRONMENT_TARGET_PRESENT, PDS_LIVE_GATE_ALLOW_REAL_PROVIDER_MUTATION<br>Review gates: PDS_LIVE_GATE_ACCESS_MODE_SELECTED, PDS_LIVE_GATE_HAZARD_LOG_CURRENT, PDS_LIVE_GATE_RISK_LOGS_CURRENT, PDS_LIVE_GATE_WRONG_PATIENT_PLAN_CURRENT, PDS_LIVE_GATE_SECURE_NETWORK_PATH_PLANNED, PDS_LIVE_GATE_ROLLBACK_REHEARSED |
| `dep_telephony_ivr_recording_provider` | Vendor approval and spend authority<br>Webhook security and replay posture<br>Recording policy approval plus named environment<br>Draft receipt for the chosen vendor and number profile<br>Current recording policy and webhook security refs attached to the same draft<br>Provider number or purchase receipt<br>Spend approval reference and named approver tied to the same action | Webhook success never equals clinically usable evidence by itself<br>Urgent-live preemption outranks routine continuation<br>Recording availability stays weaker than evidence readiness | Number inventory and vendor account identifiers<br>Webhook signatures and callback payload shape<br>Recording retrieval mechanics | Required env: telephony vendor id, telephony named approver, telephony target environment, telephony callback base url, telephony recording policy ref, telephony number profile ref, telephony spend cap gbp, telephony webhook secret ref, allow real provider mutation, allow spend<br>Blocked gates: TEL_LIVE_GATE_PHASE0_EXTERNAL_READY, TEL_LIVE_GATE_PROCUREMENT_AND_SPEND_AUTHORITY, TEL_LIVE_GATE_NAMED_APPROVER, TEL_LIVE_GATE_MUTATION_AND_SPEND_FLAGS, TEL_LIVE_GATE_FINAL_POSTURE<br>Review gates: TEL_LIVE_GATE_VENDOR_APPROVED, TEL_LIVE_GATE_WEBHOOK_SECURITY_PACK, TEL_LIVE_GATE_RECORDING_REVIEW_APPROVED, TEL_LIVE_GATE_ENVIRONMENT_TARGET |
| `dep_transcription_processing_provider` | Region and retention posture<br>Webhook security evidence<br>Named approver and final operator acknowledgement<br>Draft receipt for the chosen provider and project scope<br>Current region, retention, storage, and quarantine references<br>Vault receipt for the webhook secret reference<br>Current replay-control and callback security evidence | Transcript output remains derivative, not source truth<br>Manual review remains explicit when coverage is inadequate<br>Superseded transcript runs stay visible and replayable | Latency profile and callback shape<br>Vocabulary or confidence metadata<br>Storage scope for raw transcript artifacts | Required env: evidence provider vendor id, evidence project scope, evidence target environment, evidence region policy ref, evidence retention policy ref, evidence webhook base url, evidence webhook secret ref, evidence storage bucket ref, evidence scan policy ref, evidence named approver, allow real provider mutation, allow spend<br>Blocked gates: LIVE_GATE_EVIDENCE_PHASE0_EXTERNAL_READY, LIVE_GATE_EVIDENCE_NAMED_APPROVER_AND_ENV, LIVE_GATE_EVIDENCE_MUTATION_FLAG, LIVE_GATE_EVIDENCE_SPEND_FLAG, LIVE_GATE_EVIDENCE_FINAL_OPERATOR_ACK<br>Review gates: LIVE_GATE_EVIDENCE_REGION_POLICY_EXPLICIT, LIVE_GATE_EVIDENCE_RETENTION_POLICY_EXPLICIT, LIVE_GATE_EVIDENCE_WEBHOOK_SECURITY_READY, LIVE_GATE_EVIDENCE_STORAGE_SCOPE_DEFINED, LIVE_GATE_EVIDENCE_QUARANTINE_POLICY_FROZEN |

callback fallback remains explicit when proof is incomplete | Supplier capability tuple and surface naming<br>Commit timing windows<br>Practice-facing receipt or acknowledgement details | Required | `dep_pharmacy_directory_dohs` | Service Search access approval and route policy<br>Choice tuple freshness and capability evidence<br>Current environment-specific directory entitlement<br>Fresh route snapshot showing the current preferred, fallback, and manual paths<br>Official label checks still match current pharmacy guidance<br>Named transport route tuple or provider receipt<br>Current dispatch proof thresholds and approver evidence bound to the same attempt | Choice proof binds the exact directory tuple<br>Directory lookup never equals dispatch or closure proof<br>Refresh and no-safe-provider states remain first-class | Directory API version and query parameters<br>Provider capability filter sets<br>Source-specific freshness metadata | Required env: allow real provider mutation, pharmacy mvp ref, pharmacy named approver, pharmacy route attempt, pharmacy runtime implementation ref, pharmacy target environment, pharmacy update record combination ref, pharmacy urgent return rehearsal ref, pharmacy watch register ack<br>Blocked gates: LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_MVP_APPROVED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_NAMED_APPROVER_AND_ENVIRONMENT, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_MUTATION_FLAG_ENABLED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_WATCH_REGISTER_CLEAR, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_UPDATE_RECORD_COMBINATION_NAMED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_URGENT_RETURN_OWNERSHIP_REHEARSED, LIVE_GATE_PHASE0_EXTERNAL_FOUNDATION<br>Review gates: LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_CONSENT_AND_DISPATCH_MODELS_IMPLEMENTED |
| `dep_pharmacy_referral_transport` | Named transport route profile and provider tuple<br>Dispatch proof and acknowledgement thresholds signed off<br>Manual urgent-return ownership rehearsal evidence<br>Fresh route snapshot showing the current preferred, fallback, and manual paths<br>Official label checks still match current pharmacy guidance<br>Named transport route tuple or provider receipt<br>Current dispatch proof thresholds and approver evidence bound to the same attempt | Dispatch proof never equals settled referral truth on acceptance alone<br>Acknowledgement and expiry remain separate facts<br>Manual urgent-return remains first-class even after live transport exists | Transport channel and receipt shape<br>Mailbox or endpoint identifiers<br>Provider-specific retry window values | Required env: allow real provider mutation, pharmacy mvp ref, pharmacy named approver, pharmacy route attempt, pharmacy runtime implementation ref, pharmacy target environment, pharmacy update record combination ref, pharmacy urgent return rehearsal ref, pharmacy watch register ack<br>Blocked gates: LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_MVP_APPROVED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_NAMED_APPROVER_AND_ENVIRONMENT, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_MUTATION_FLAG_ENABLED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_WATCH_REGISTER_CLEAR, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_UPDATE_RECORD_COMBINATION_NAMED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_URGENT_RETURN_OWNERSHIP_REHEARSED, LIVE_GATE_PHASE0_EXTERNAL_FOUNDATION<br>Review gates: LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_CONSENT_AND_DISPATCH_MODELS_IMPLEMENTED |
| `dep_pharmacy_outcome_observation` | Assured supplier/system combination for Update Record<br>Reconciliation runtime implementation reference<br>Watch-register closure for visibility and manual fallback gaps<br>Fresh route snapshot showing the current preferred, fallback, and manual paths<br>Official label checks still match current pharmacy guidance<br>Named transport route tuple or provider receipt<br>Current dispatch proof thresholds and approver evidence bound to the same attempt | Update Record is visibility only, never urgent transport<br>Weak or delayed outcomes never auto-close the request lineage<br>Practice-disabled fallback remains explicit and same-shell | Transport wrapper and acknowledgement cadence<br>Supplier-specific visibility field mapping<br>Assured-combination registry values | Required env: allow real provider mutation, pharmacy mvp ref, pharmacy named approver, pharmacy route attempt, pharmacy runtime implementation ref, pharmacy target environment, pharmacy update record combination ref, pharmacy urgent return rehearsal ref, pharmacy watch register ack<br>Blocked gates: LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_MVP_APPROVED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_NAMED_APPROVER_AND_ENVIRONMENT, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_MUTATION_FLAG_ENABLED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_WATCH_REGISTER_CLEAR, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_UPDATE_RECORD_COMBINATION_NAMED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_URGENT_RETURN_OWNERSHIP_REHEARSED, LIVE_GATE_PHASE0_EXTERNAL_FOUNDATION<br>Review gates: LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_CONSENT_AND_DISPATCH_MODELS_IMPLEMENTED |
| `dep_pharmacy_urgent_return_professional_routes` | Fresh route snapshot showing the current preferred, fallback, and manual paths<br>Official label checks still match current pharmacy guidance<br>Named transport route tuple or provider receipt<br>Current dispatch proof thresholds and approver evidence bound to the same attempt | Urgent return remains a human-operated safety net and cannot collapse into ordinary Update Record semantics<br>Acknowledgement on the current route is required before the case can look settled<br>Phone escalation remains explicit when the monitored digital path is unavailable | Monitored mailbox or professional-number identifiers<br>Practice-level rota and escalation ownership details<br>Route acknowledgement wording and local handoff cadence | Required env: allow real provider mutation, pharmacy mvp ref, pharmacy named approver, pharmacy route attempt, pharmacy runtime implementation ref, pharmacy target environment, pharmacy update record combination ref, pharmacy urgent return rehearsal ref, pharmacy watch register ack<br>Blocked gates: LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_MVP_APPROVED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_NAMED_APPROVER_AND_ENVIRONMENT, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_MUTATION_FLAG_ENABLED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_WATCH_REGISTER_CLEAR, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_UPDATE_RECORD_COMBINATION_NAMED, LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_URGENT_RETURN_OWNERSHIP_REHEARSED, LIVE_GATE_PHASE0_EXTERNAL_FOUNDATION<br>Review gates: LIVE_GATE_PHARMACY_CONSENT_AND_DISPATCH_MODELS_IMPLEMENTED |
| `dep_nhs_app_embedded_channel_ecosystem` | Scope-window approval and commissioning posture<br>Current NHS login readiness for embedded use<br>Named environment, approver, and release evidence<br>Draft receipt for the current NHS App stage pack<br>Current NHS login readiness, eligibility, and demo references<br>Named commissioning or sponsor approval reference<br>Current accessibility, design, and service evidence refs<br>Fresh gate snapshot stamped with the capture date<br>Official label checks still match the current NHS login guidance<br>Named redirect review reference linked to the active route family<br>Scope approval reference tied to the same environment target | Embedded return intent remains explicit<br>Header suppression and webview constraints remain testable<br>Site-link publication stays environment-scoped and mutation-gated | Site-link values and package identifiers<br>JS bridge surface details<br>Environment-specific jump-off inventory | Required env: nhs app named approver, nhs app environment target, allow real provider mutation, nhs login named approver, nhs login environment target<br>Blocked gates: LIVE_GATE_PHASE7_SCOPE_WINDOW, LIVE_GATE_EXTERNAL_FOUNDATION_WITHHELD, LIVE_GATE_COMMISSIONING_EXPLICIT, LIVE_GATE_NAMED_APPROVER_PRESENT, LIVE_GATE_ENVIRONMENT_TARGET_PRESENT, LIVE_GATE_MUTATION_FLAG_ENABLED, LIVE_GATE_NHS_LOGIN_PARTNER_APPROVED, LIVE_GATE_ENVIRONMENT_TARGET_MISSING, LIVE_GATE_MUTATION_FLAG_DISABLED, LIVE_GATE_IM1_SCAL_APPROVED<br>Review gates: LIVE_GATE_NHS_LOGIN_READY_ENOUGH, LIVE_GATE_PATIENT_ELIGIBILITY_EXPLICIT, LIVE_GATE_DEMO_ENVIRONMENT_READY, LIVE_GATE_ACCESSIBILITY_EVIDENCE_READY, LIVE_GATE_DESIGN_READINESS_READY, LIVE_GATE_SERVICE_DESK_READY, LIVE_GATE_REDIRECT_URI_REVIEW, LIVE_GATE_TECHNICAL_CONFORMANCE_PENDING |
| `dep_assistive_model_vendor_family` | Current supplier assurance pack for the exact route family and cohort<br>Rollback rehearsal and kill-switch proof tied to the proposed rollout tuple<br>Named approver, live cohort definition, and trust-envelope freshness | Assistive vendors remain optional and may not become a baseline correctness dependency<br>Shadow-only, observe-only, hidden, or frozen states remain first-class outcomes<br>Human provenance and rollback paths stay explicit even when a vendor is healthy | Vendor scoring and inference metadata shape<br>Subprocessor inventory and region posture<br>Drafting or summarisation surface details that remain behind adapter boundaries | Named approver and live cohort definition<br>Fresh supplier assurance and subprocessor review<br>Rollback rehearsal and kill-switch proof before widening beyond shadow or observe-only |
| `dep_nhs_assurance_and_standards_sources` | Current standards version map for the release or onboarding pack under review<br>Governance acknowledgement that refreshed standards baselines were rechecked<br>Evidence-pack refresh proving release assumptions still match the current watchlist | Release and onboarding assumptions must stay bound to the current standards watchlist<br>Stale or moved standards sources block widening until reviewed explicitly<br>Standards exceptions remain explicit and time-bounded rather than implied | Source-link locations and naming changes<br>Supplier-assurance attachment formats<br>Review cadence for refreshed or retired guidance sources | Governance sign-off on refreshed standards baselines<br>Current watchlist evidence attached to the release or onboarding candidate<br>Explicit exception registration if any dependency assumption diverges from the current source set |

        Live-provider rules:

        - No provider-specific default may silently alter proof thresholds, degraded posture, or closure rules.
        - Fresh evidence remains mandatory even when a supplier says a path is already "ready".
        - Audience posture stays contract-bound: patient, staff, and support copy must match the active proof rung.
